message:
test(transport): add unit tests for Transport trait, SendPermit, and TransportError [bd-rhup]

Add 14 new tests to transport lib.rs covering:
- TransportError Display for all variants
- TransportError is_cancelled/is_closed negative cases
- Transport::close and Transport::recv on RecordingTransport
- SendPermit::send with Request and Response messages
- Multiple message sends via Transport trait
- TwoPhaseTransport::reserve_send + commit flow
- Multiple sequential two-phase sends
- Notification (no id) through SendPermit

Transport lib.rs: 22 tests (up from 8).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
